title: taraxacum praetervisum
intro: Taraxacum praetervisum, also known as the lesser dandelion or wild dandelion, is a lesser-known species of the Taraxacum genus, which is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family. This plant is believed to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and skin problems. The health benefits of Taraxacum praetervisum include its ability to support liver function, reduce stress and anxiety, and even exhibit antiviral properties. Taraxacum praetervisum can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, tincture, and infusions, making it a versatile addition to traditional herbal remedies.
